param.value: "TC04 - Add to Cart button is visible and clickable"
"TC05 - Clicking Add to Cart shows success notification"
"TC06 - Cart badge count increments after adding"

exception.message: Cart badge should increment. Before: 1, After: 1 expected [true] but found [false]
exception.full-stacktrace: java.lang.AssertionError: Cart badge should increment. Before: 1, After: 1 expected [true] but found [false] at org.testng.Assert.fail(Assert.java:111) at org.testng.Assert.failNotEquals(Assert.java:1578) at org.testng.Assert.assertTrue(Assert.java:57) at stepdefinitions.AddToCartSteps.cart_badge_count_increments(AddToCartSteps.java:183) at ✽.the cart badge count increments(classpath:features/AddToCart.feature:36)

param.value: "TC08 - Product name in cart matches product page"
"TC09 - Product price in cart is correct"
"TC10 - User can remove item from cart"
"TC01 - Country selector widget is visible in the header"
"TC02 - Default India page shows INR symbol on all product prices"
"TC03 - Switching to BHD changes all product prices to BHD"

exception.message: All product prices should contain the symbol: BHD expected [true] but found [false]
exception.full-stacktrace: java.lang.AssertionError: All product prices should contain the symbol: BHD expected [true] but found [false] at org.testng.Assert.fail(Assert.java:111) at org.testng.Assert.failNotEquals(Assert.java:1578) at org.testng.Assert.assertTrue(Assert.java:57) at stepdefinitions.CountryCurrencySteps.all_prices_show_symbol(CountryCurrencySteps.java:107) at ✽.all product prices show the "BHD" currency symbol(classpath:features/CountryCurrency.feature:26)

param.value: "TC04 - Switching back to India from UAE restores INR prices"
"TC05 - All visible product prices (not just first) show BHD after INR switch"

exception.message: All visible product prices should contain: BHD expected [true] but found [false]
exception.full-stacktrace: java.lang.AssertionError: All visible product prices should contain: BHD expected [true] but found [false] at org.testng.Assert.fail(Assert.java:111) at org.testng.Assert.failNotEquals(Assert.java:1578) at org.testng.Assert.assertTrue(Assert.java:57) at stepdefinitions.CountryCurrencySteps.all_visible_prices_contain_symbol(CountryCurrencySteps.java:126) at ✽.all visible product prices contain the "BHD" currency symbol(classpath:features/CountryCurrency.feature:38)

param.value: "TC06 - Country to currency mapping is correct"
"TC07 - Product listing still shows at least one product after country switch"
"TC08 - AED symbol is not visible when India is selected by default"
"TC09 - INR symbol is not visible after switching to UAE"
"TC10 - Product prices are non-empty after country switch"
"TC11 - Country selector dropdown closes after a valid selection"

param.value: "TC08 - Short OTP keeps Verify button disabled"
